Metadata.title: Venezuela Earthquake Yellow Pages | Directory
Metadata.description: Centralized contingency directory. Verified information on web platforms built following the earthquake in Venezuela.

Directory.empty: No records available in this section at the moment.

About.title: JOIN THE EFFORT
About.description: This portal is an open-source effort to centralize aid tools. If you are a developer, designer, or know of initiatives that should be indexed, join to help organize the contingency response.
